basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Delhi Project Technical Support I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi) Project Technical Support I (Laboratory Technician) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website www.aiims.edu. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the AIIMS Delhi Project Technical Support I (Laboratory Technician) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years Age Relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST and 3 years for OBC candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: 10th + Diploma (MLT/DMLT/ITI) + two Years' experience in relevant subject / field
qualification.details: 10th pass Diploma in MLT/DMLT/ITI Two years of experience in a relevant subject/ field.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Delhi Project Technical Support I (Laboratory Technician) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 12-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Delhi Project Technical Support I (Laboratory Technician) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 12-06-2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have completed their 10th standard, followed by a Diploma in MLT/DMLT/ITI, and possess at least two years of relevant experience in the field.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Technical Support I position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this position is 28 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Technical Support I role?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 18,000 plus 30% House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for this job?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to send your resume and required documents to the official email address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the AIIMS Delhi recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve shortlisting of applications followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Project Technical Support I (Laboratory Technician).

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual position. The job is offered on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' link.
